title: How do you find out if the LLM API is giving degraded responses
abstract: If you are building on top of multiple LLM APIs or even a single one amongst OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, etc. what do you do when the API starts degrading (slow TTFT, elevated error rates, timeouts). Or e
abstract_zh: friends, 如果你在用大模型API时发现响应不如从前了，不妨试试 **Ask HN: How do you find out if the LLM API is giving degraded responses**！这货能帮你快速揪出问题所在，无论是写周报卡壳了还是调Bug急着救火，它都能让你瞬间从“救火队员”变身“灭火小队”。相比其他工具，这家伙简直不要太懂人心，效率嗖嗖的！
